zh.title: 艾达币/美元技术分析：短线承压震荡偏弱
zh.content:
艾达币/美元技术分析：短线承压震荡偏弱，价格跌破20日均线后维持低位整理，整体动能不足，多头修复未形成有效突破信号修复，空头占优

技术指标方面，MACD持续位于零轴下方并扩散，空头动能占优，但RSI缺失使超卖判断不够明确，短期仍偏弱势运行结构未改善观望

下方支撑位关注0.140整数关口及前低区域，上方阻力位在0.145及0.1496附近，均线压制明显，反弹空间受限震荡区间收窄波动加剧

操作建议以观望为主，激进者可在0.14附近轻仓试探反弹，但需严格止损控制风险，突破0.145后再考虑顺势跟多谨慎交易为宜

en.title: Cardano vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
ADA/USD is currently in a short-term bearish phase, with price trading at 0.140708 and consistently holding below the 20-period SMA at 0.1496404. This positioning confirms a loss of bullish momentum and suggests that recent upward attempts have failed to establish a sustained trend reversal. The 24-hour range between 0.143201 and 0.14 reflects tight consolidation near the lower boundary, indicating sellers remain slightly in control.

Momentum indicators reinforce this outlook, with MACD at -0.002846 signaling bearish divergence and weakening upside pressure. Although RSI is unavailable, price action alone suggests sub-50 momentum conditions given repeated rejection near intraday highs. The lack of a signal line reading limits precision, but overall structure still favors downside continuation unless buyers reclaim levels above short-term moving averages.

Key support is forming around the psychological 0.1400 level, which has been tested multiple times in recent sessions. A decisive breakdown below this zone could open the path toward deeper support near 0.1380–0.1360. On the upside, immediate resistance is seen at 0.1432, followed by stronger barriers at the SMA20 near 0.1496, which now acts as a dynamic resistance zone.

From a trading perspective, the market favors cautious positioning. Short-term traders may consider range-bound strategies between 0.1400 support and 0.1432 resistance, while breakout traders should wait for confirmation above the SMA20 before turning bullish. Until price reclaims 0.1496 with volume support, rallies are likely to be corrective rather than trend-reversing, keeping the broader bias slightly bearish.
